title: Dark And Strange
content:
When first Love came, then was I but a boy
    Swept with delirium of undreamt joy.
    Now Love comes to a man serious with change
    Of life and death--and makes the world dark and strange.
meaning:
John Frederick Freeman's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Dark And Strange"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
